appName.message: Keyboard Layout Switcher — Fix Mistyped Text · 9 Languages
appName.description: Extension name shown in toolbar and store

appShortDescription.message: Fix text typed in the wrong keyboard layout. 9 languages including Russian, German, French, Ukrainian. Offline, open source.
appShortDescription.description: Manifest description, also serves as store short description (132 chars max)

commandDescription.message: Switch the layout of the selected text
commandDescription.description: Description for the Ctrl+Shift+L command in chrome://extensions/shortcuts

popup_detectedNoContent.message: Detected: (content script unavailable on this page)

popup_detectedField.description: Shows the focused element tag, e.g. 'field: <textarea>'. $1 is the tag name.

popup_excludedByPolicyExplain.message: $1 is excluded by your site policy. Edit the list in Settings.

popup_undoTitle.message: Undo the last decrypt on this page

popup_shortcutHintBefore.message: Tip: focus a field and press

popup_resultOk.description: Status after a successful decrypt. $1=adapter, $2=mode, $3=optional ' · ru→en' detection

popup_clipboardFallback.message: Copied to clipboard (couldn't write into composer: $1).

popup_emptyField.message: No text in the focused field.

popup_composerNotFound.message: Couldn't find a text field on this page. Click into one and try again.

popup_notEditable.message: Focused element is not a text field.

popup_extensionNotLoaded.message: Reload this page so the extension can attach.

popup_couldntDecrypt.description: $1 is the failure reason or 'no response'

popup_privacyNote.message: 🔒 Runs entirely in your browser. No text leaves your device.

options_uiLanguageHint.message: Language of the popup and this page. Auto = follow your browser.

options_firstRunBody.message: We couldn't auto-detect the languages you type in from your browser locale. Please pick at least two below — you can change this anytime from this page.

options_privacyBody.message: By default, decryption runs entirely on your machine — no text leaves the browser. Bundled languages: 9 (English, Russian, Ukrainian, Belarusian, German, French, Greek, Hebrew, Turkish).

options_apiEndpointHint.message: Used only when the checkbox is on. Leave empty to stay fully offline.

options_languagesHint.message: Pick the languages the layout should switch between. At least 2.

options_replaceWhole.message: Decrypt the whole composer when nothing is selected

options_replaceWholeHint.message: Off — extension only decrypts text you have explicitly selected; on supported sites with empty selection it shows a notice instead of touching the field.

options_autoCorrect.message: Auto-correct words as I type (Punto-Switcher style)

options_autoCorrectHint.message: When you type a space or punctuation after a word that's clearly in the wrong layout, the extension fixes it in place. Skipped on password fields and on sites excluded by your site policy. Press Backspace to undo.

options_siteListHint.message: Hostnames match exactly or by suffix (e.g. vk.com also matches m.vk.com). Leave empty for the default (everywhere) mode.

options_shortcutHint.message: The keyboard shortcut is configured at $1.

options_contactBody.message: Open to suggestions, bug reports, or new language requests — write to

notification_skippedPolicy.message: Skipped: $1 is excluded by your site policy.

notification_selectFirst.message: Select some text first, or click into a text field.

convert_languagesNotBundled.message: Some requested languages aren't bundled offline; configure an API endpoint in Settings.
